article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 174 affordable rental units at 6th Street under permanent housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed a bylaw authorizing a formal housing agreement with Metro Vancouver Housing Corporation, legally binding 174 non-market (below-market-rate) rental units at 7786–7792 6th Street to remain affordable housing permanently.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
